item.title: Remote Collaboration: How to Build Human Connection Across Pixels
item.description:
Description

Thesis/Description: At the core of all learning is human connection and vulnerability. We have to encourage folks to ease the anxiety and fear with imposter syndrome by knowing each other well. This leads to better code, better culture, and better products by intentional collaboration and learning.
item.dc:creator: Rainu Ittycheriah
